home.title: Refine. Build. Race.
home.description: At Red Bird Racing (EVRT), we empower aspiring engineers through hands-on experience in motorsport. Our mission is to cultivate innovation, teamwork, and technical skills essential for success in the engineering field.

about.title: About Us
about.description:
Refine. Build. Race.

Red Bird Racing (EVRT) is the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology’s official Formula Student racing team. Named after HKUST’s “Red Bird Sundial”, the team is dedicated to competing in Formula Student events and engaging with the local motorsport community.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Meet the passionate individuals behind Red Bird Racing's success.

news.title: Team Updates
news.description: Stay informed about our racing journey and achievements.

sponsors.title:
Partner With
Innovation Leaders
sponsors.description: Join our growing network of sponsors who support the future of engineering. Your partnership helps us push boundaries and achieve new heights in Formula Student racing.

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.description: Experience our journey through captivating moments and milestones.
